from Hindsight"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne v3.6.0 includes a ","$L7"," that migrates memories from Hindsight self-hosted into Mnemosyne's episodic storage. Unlike the generic import path (which routes through ","$L8"," and assigns current timestamps), the Hindsight importer writes directly to ","$L9"," — preserving the full historical record."]}],"\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f"],["$L20"],"$L21"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@22"]},null,false,"$@22"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L23",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$24",["$L25"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"R1fXx0_zISQsUtYxfGXRl"}

7:["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hindsight importer"}]
8:["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]
9:["$","code",null,{"children":"episodic_memory"}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What Gets Preserved"}]
b:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Hindsight Field"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne Destination"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mentioned_at"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"timestamp"}]," (original value)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"fact_type"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," as ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hindsight:{fact_type}"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"tags"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," (session tags extracted)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"chunk_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Stable hash in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"proof_count"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}]," score bonus"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"context"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"entities"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata_json"}]," (full preservation)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"hindsight_id"}]," in metadata"]}]]}]]}]]}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Input Sources"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":"The importer accepts two input sources:"}]
e:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"JSON export file"}]," — a Hindsight export containing memories"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Live HTTP API"}]," — a running Hindsight instance at ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/v1/default/banks/{bank}/memories/list"}]]}],"\n"]}]
f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"CLI Usage"}]
10:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# From JSON export\nmnemosyne import-hindsight hindsight-export.json hermes\n\n# From live API\nmnemosyne import-hindsight http://localhost:8888 hermes\n"}]}]
11:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Python API"}]
12:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne.core.importers import HindsightImporter, import_from_hindsight\n\n# From JSON export\nimporter = HindsightImporter(file_path=\"hindsight-export.json\", bank=\"hermes\")\nresult = importer.run(mnemosyne)\n\n# From live API\nimporter = HindsightImporter(base_url=\"http://localhost:8888\", bank=\"hermes\")\nresult = importer.run(mnemosyne)\n\n# Convenience wrapper\nresult = import_from_hindsight(mnemosyne, file_path=\"export.json\", bank=\"hermes\")\n"}]}]
13:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Result Object"}]
14:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"result.provider      # \"hindsight\"\nresult.total         # Total items found\nresult.imported      # Successfully inserted\nresult.skipped       # Duplicates or empty content\nresult.failed        # Insertion errors\nresult.memory_ids    # List of imported memory IDs\nresult.errors        # List of error strings\n"}]}]
15:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Duplicate Handling"}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":["The importer uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"stable SHA256-based IDs"}]," with an ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hs_"}]," prefix. Re-importing the same export is idempotent — duplicates are skipped via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"INSERT OR IGNORE"}],"."]}]
17:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Importance Scoring"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":["Hindsight ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fact_type"}]," maps to base importance:"]}]
19:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"fact_type"}]}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Base Importance"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"world"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.75"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"experience"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.65"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"observation"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.55"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"(other)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.50"}]]}]]}]]}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"proof_count"}]," adds up to 0.15 bonus (capped at 1.0)."]}]
1b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Provider Registry"}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Hindsight is registered as the 7th supported provider:"}]
